chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 890 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No. 07. 2. For order on main case. 3. For order on CMA No. 1084/23 (stay) 05.12.2025 Mr. Nawab Zada Tahir, advocate holding brier for Ms. Bushra Zia, advocate for applicant. This reference is pending since 2023 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Today, brief is being held and time is being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
